Setlist
Shows With at Least One Officially-Released Song: 1991 - 1999
The shows on this list have had at least one song officially released.

Some shows have had multiple songs released on different compilations (e.g., 3.14.99's Two Step was released on the first Blenheim Vineyards Painted Series EP, while the Bartender and Don't Drink the Water from the same show were released on the Warehouse 10 Vol. 5 compilation). In cases such as this, we have listed one of the appearances in the "Release Name" column and any other releases with unique songs in the "Additional Release(s)" column.

1991â1999
2000â2009
2010â2019
2020âpresent
